items.name: Green Alien Gir Ushanka w/ Long Scene Hair (Black)
items.description:
👽🛸

🌟Dont forget to Like the Item🌟

Unique alien ushanka hair featuring a green alien Gir-style ushanka with long scene hair for a bold, alternative look. This ushanka hat with hair blends a playful alien hood style with long scene hair, making it perfect for scene outfits, emo avatars, alt looks, and nostalgic roleplay. Designed as a hat with hair accessory, it works great for aesthetic outfits, photos, and standing out in lobbies with a fun green alien vibe.
